title: hemionitis ceterachoides
intro: Hemionitis ceterachoides, also known as the wall rue, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hemionitis ceterachoides include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its dried rhizomes and leaves can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules.
